ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Decision Tree, SVM) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for training the model */,
  "model_training_time" REAL /* Time taken to train the model */,
  "model_evaluation_metrics" TEXT /* Summary of the evaluation metrics for the model */,
  "model_performance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the model's performance */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "num_instances" INTEGER /* Number of instances in the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "dataset_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "dataset_size_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "dataset_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the dataset */,
  "dataset_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluated model */,
  "accuracy_percent" REAL /* Accuracy percentage of the model */,
  "precision_percent" REAL /* Precision percentage of the model */,
  "recall_percent" REAL /* Recall percentage of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "roc_auc_score" REAL /* ROC AUC score of the model */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix as a serialized string or JSON */,
  "metric_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_reports_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor or manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_reports_to FOREIGN KEY ("user_reports_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the evaluation data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
